task_updates.executor_notes: Added DatabaseHandler force-reconcile primitives that intentionally bypass the normal strict transition guards only for authoritative on-chain correction. They accept submitted/processing/failed/manual_hold, reject pending_confirmation/queued/cancelled through the unchanged guard path, append reconcile_confirmed/reconcile_failed tx_signature_history entries, and emit WARNING logs with before/after status. Dedicated reconciliation tests cover allowed starts, rejected starts, history append, WARNING logging, and unchanged mark_payment_* strictness.

Implemented dynamic Solana priority-fee selection inside the shared SolanaClient. `_get_dynamic_priority_fee` now uses `getRecentPrioritizationFees` via SDK method when available and solders RPC request fallback otherwise, computes the 75th percentile of non-zero fees, clamps to the configured floor/ceiling, logs WARNING and falls back to the static floor on error, and `send_sol` now uses/logs the chosen value. Tests cover percentile math, floor clamp, ceiling clamp, fallback behavior, and send_sol wiring.

Implemented admin alert fallback in the post-cleanup PaymentWorkerCog. The cog now reads `ADMIN_FALLBACK_CHANNEL_ID`, both success and failure admin DM paths route through `_deliver_admin_alert`, the helper falls back to `safe_send_message` on `discord.Forbidden` or HTTP 429, and it logs ERROR when neither DM nor fallback delivery succeeds. Tests cover helper routing, Forbidden-triggered fallback, and double-failure ERROR logging.

Added `scripts/check_payment_invariants.py` as a daily read-only payment audit. It implements all five requested checks, prints a structured JSON report, exits non-zero on hard violations, verifies confirmed Solana rows against `getSignatureStatuses`, checks stale pending/processing rows, verifies wallet test-payment provenance, detects wallet-address reuse, and evaluates the 24h admin payout cap. Synthetic-fixture tests cover each invariant and the non-zero `main()` path. No CI workflow or scheduler config was added.

Added structured `tx_confirm_decision` logger.info events to all three `SolanaClient.confirm_tx` branches: confirmed, not_found, and errored. The log payload includes `event`, `signature`, `err`, `slot`, `confirmation_status`, and `decision`. Tests assert the structured extra payload for each branch without changing confirmation semantics.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified both force-reconcile primitives accept only `submitted`/`processing`/`failed`/`manual_hold`, reject `pending_confirmation`/`queued`/`cancelled`, append `reconcile_*` tx_signature_history entries, and log at WARNING. The original `mark_payment_confirmed`/`mark_payment_failed` guards were left unchanged and are covered by regression assertions.

Verified `_get_dynamic_priority_fee` computes the 75th percentile of non-zero fees, clamps to `[floor, ceiling]`, falls back to the static floor with a WARNING on exceptions, and is wired into `send_sol`. Tests cover percentile math, floor clamp, ceiling clamp, fallback, and send-path usage.

Verified `_deliver_admin_alert` tries DM first, falls back to `ADMIN_FALLBACK_CHANNEL_ID` on `discord.Forbidden` or HTTP 429, logs ERROR when both paths fail, and both success/failure admin DM flows now route through the helper.

Verified `scripts/check_payment_invariants.py` implements checks (a)-(e), exits non-zero on hard violations, and has synthetic-fixture coverage for each invariant. No CI workflow or scheduler file was added.

Verified `SolanaClient.confirm_tx` emits structured `tx_confirm_decision` logs for confirmed, not_found, and errored branches, and the test module asserts the expected extra-dict shape for each branch.
